headline: Premier League — update
body: Strasbourg head coach Gary O'Neil an early contender for the Ipswich job following Kieran McKenna departure. He kept Bournemouth and Wolves in the Premier League previously 🚜🍒🐺 #ITFC @TeleFootball https://t.co/H1pfX2hSAe
text:
Strasbourg head coach Gary O'Neil an early contender for the Ipswich job following Kieran McKenna departure. He kept Bournemouth and Wolves in the Premier League previously 🚜🍒🐺 #ITFC @TeleFootball
